---
name: Performance Improvement
about: Request to address a performance bottleneck
title: "[Performance] "
labels: Performance
assignees: ""
---

### Problem
> What's the performance issue? (response latency, concurrency conflicts, query overload, etc.)

### Current Metrics
> Measurements, logs, profiling, etc. Without numbers, there's no way to confirm improvement.

```
Example: K6 results — TPS 230, p95 latency 1.2s, error rate 3.1%
```

### Target Metrics
> What level of improvement are you aiming for?

### Proposed Approach
> Describe your current hypothesis, if any.

### Measurement Method
> K6, query execution plans, load test scenarios, etc.
